name: Virtual Golf at 12 Ocean Grill
about: 12 Ocean Grill at Virtual Golf features three state-of-the-art golf simulators with access to over 18 different courses from around the world. The venue integrates a full-service restaurant, allowing players to enjoy food and beverages during and after their simulated rounds. Located in Seabrook, New Hampshire, the facility provides a casual environment where guests can combine dining with indoor golf play. The simulators offer realistic golfing experiences for both casual players and enthusiasts seeking a diverse selection of world-class courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Three state-of-the-art golf simulators for a premium experience
Over 18 world-class courses to choose from
Full food and beverage service available during play
Combines indoor golf with a casual restaurant atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a menu featuring seafood and other options. Food can be enjoyed during and after golf sessions.
Full bar service available with a dedicated drink menu.

simulator_hardware.notes: Website specifies 'state-of-the-art' simulators but does not name specific brands

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a full kitchen and bar service with food and beverages available for purchase during your session.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time for 18 holes, but typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and appears to be kid-friendly with a casual atmosphere and family-oriented events.
